string 2: Oh, it's you! I've been waiting for you.

All of the Royal Knights have gathered. We're all preparing
for the coming battle.
This place seems perfect for intense activity.
{next}Perfect timing.
{next}I'm not too sure about this.
If you're bored, you wanna play a card game?
I know, right?

I heard a human saying, "Don't sweat the small stuff." I
agree. Details don't matter.
Ooh. Good idea! Let's play!
It'd be great if you could take them on.
Everyone wants to fight you.
The order is up to you. Talk to whoever you want to fight.
Card games are so much fun. Thanks for playing with me.
But... I still want to get ready for the big battle.

We're all preparing for the coming battle. This place 
seems perfect for intense activity.
{next}Let's play a card game.
{next}Let's fight!
{end}Never mind.
{next}Sure, let's do it.
{end}Never mind.
I'm itching to get some exercise!

I need to work out a little more. Hey, how about we fight
again?
All right! I've been waiting. Let's give it our best!

Phew! It feels so good to move around! Thanks for fighting
with me.

Both my armor and I are in great shape. But I am getting
somewhat rusty.

I get better and better when I fight you. If you have the
energy, how about another fight?
Hello there. How are you doing?
Is that so? Well, then. Do not go easy on me. Let us begin.
That was a great fight. Allow me to thank you.
I would like to go buy some sweets to refresh myself.

But fighting with you is more appealing than sweets. Would
you like to have another round?
Can I help you?

Sure. I am in! How about whoever loses buys us both some
pancakes?

Haha! Looks like you win! I shall buy you anything you would
like after the fight.

I've noticed your outfit is quite beautiful. It must be a
popular style among humans.

I cannot forget about the beautiful fight I had with you. I
would fight again if I could.
Did you need me for something?

Hohoho! I've been waiting for this! A battle with you...
would be truly beautiful indeed!

It was a beautiful battle. Thank you for such a wonderful
experience.

Hello. Good to see you. Cards are part of a knight's
etiquette. Would you like to play?

Right now, I would rather move my body than rest! Would you
like to fight again?
Do you wish to challenge me?

Understood! I, Gallantmon, wonder if you can withstand the
blow of my holy lance, Gram!
Haha. I, Gallantmon, am impressed. Your moves were great.

I will eventually be taking on a big battle. But, as a
knight, I will not be daunted.

As a knight, I will accept a challenge at any time.
Are you challenging me to a rematch?
...Hm? Did you need something?
Very well. Let us fight fairly, in the spirit of chivalry!
I have no doubt. You are the best knight of them all.

Thanks for helping me the other day. Would you like
to play some cards as a break?

Hmm, I am not satisfied with image training alone.
I want to fight with YOU more!
The decisive battle approaches...

Very well. Let us see your determination on the eve
of this battle!

I think I did pretty well against you. I should be
confident in my own strength.

Hmm. I should have ended my food tour with a parfait.
That is all I regret before battle.

In order to forget my hunger, I must fight!
How about one more battle?

What are you up to? Did you need help
finding some good restaurants?

Oh, great! I actually ate a little too much.
Perfect timing for some after-meal exercise!

That was a great battle. After such a good workout,
I am getting hungry again...

I do not mind this place, but there is no music.
I wish they had a band here.

I would like to make a few more adjustments
before the final battle. Could you fight me?
Mm hmm hmm... ♪

I was just wishing for a good way to kill time.
Yes, entertain me, then!

Now I know what I must work on for the upcoming battle.
Thank you for the fight.

This place feels a bit cramped. But if I must wait here,
I shall put up with it...

What? You want to fight again?
Haha. You are full of energy!

Do not wander around my feet.
I may accidentally step on you.

You are either brave or foolhardy to challenge this giant.
Very well. I shall be your opponent!

You are quite interesting! It has been a long time
since I last enjoyed fighting so much.

So I just wait here? Hmm. Is there anything
I can do to pass the time?

Fighting you refines my mind and body.
I'll fight ya as many times as yer willing!
Hey there. Working hard?

All right. I've been wanting to move!
But if we're doing this, ya gotta give me yer best.

You're pretty strong! Thanks to you, now I'm all warmed up.
That was fun!
As a member of the Royal Knights, I must always be ready.

We are about to face the final battle, but I still want to
be stronger! Please fight me!
To prepare for the coming battle, I am focusing my mind...

It would be great to fight against you!
I must make my master proud.

I lost... How mortifying! My master would be so
ashamed of me.

I do not deserve to be a Royal Knight.
After this battle, I will start over from an egg.
Whoa. You're really strong! Fight me again!
Yay, I won! That was a good fight. Thanks!

I, Gallantmon, did not know of such tactics! I have learned
much from you. Thank you!

I have won, but you gave me a hard time. Come back stronger
and challenge me again.

Hmm. I'm not quite there yet. But I'll get stronger, so
let's fight again.

Hmph. Now do you see what I'm capable of? 
But at least that was somewhat enjoyable.
Man, I lost... I was pretty sure I would win.

Well, there is nothing to be discouraged about. It means the
opponent was too strong!

Darn it! I lost! You're so strong. Gimme lotsa advice about
how to win, okay?
I won! It feels so good! Let's do that again. This is lotsa fun!
I will continue my search for justice. How about you?

There is still much that I do not understand
about humans. I must keep learning!

You have demonstrated to me your beliefs.
You have my gratitude.

I am searching for what constitutes justice.
Allow me to take another look.
What?! You defeated everyone here?
A-Amazing! I've never seen anyone so strong...!
I didn't think you'd beat me so easily. But it was fun!

Everyone enjoyed their battle against you. I hope you
enjoyed yourself as well!

You've defeated all of the Royal Knights!
Congratulations!
